item.title: Play board games with Gothenburg Boardgamers - Open for everyone
item.description:
## What we're about
GoBo is a board game association for people of all ages and levels of experience. We provide locales to play in and boardgames (over 500 of them), have some snacks and drinks for sale and create different events. The purpose of the association is to bring people together through board gaming and to create a safe enviroment where everyone can feel welcome.
We're located on Gyllenkrooksgatan 5, to the left of the main entrance and we're open every wednesday 18-22 and every saturday 12-22 at the earliest. We also offer a variety of themed days and special events.
Visiting us and playing with us is always completely free the first time and after the first time you have the option of becoming a member or a paying a small fee each time you visit.
If you want to play something you can just drop in when we're open. There's no need to announce that you're coming or bring someone to play with, there are always people around ready to play something within a reasonable time period. You also don't need to have played board games before, we are always happy to explain rules for new players.
We are a club with hundreds of active members, most of whom do not use meetup, therefore attendance numbers on meetup do not reflect the number of people at the club.
For more information on membership, how to get to us etc. you can visit our website on [www.gothenburgboardgamers.se](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.gothenburgboardgamers.se%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1sfn3yFfAB6B5qmqSYQo2f_gJ1Mk9Y21Dj-Smfe746ajTH6wGMvAy3VQE&h=AT3-GlcVLUkzu0Ac7Ssgvg9O5LW6Bj73bd-x6chXm0C9B-ggImutKRD5yxk6d14SYn7SHnS0QOBfpe60TOkQYnXvfvPRfjKIoJ5Rf05L_FtCQGC9cNcKDBexammloywfxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT3Zm80FT7rliNwE1ITfOcyw2CeIOHuFcPCCIGQzpi_2BLjm_9MqLFsPFtMsQgHETxwpXXBL4F3O1hakoDV2c0JzuIQbVlr-gsXfnBIbLsbk-E3pgzYilzq-zllVjXwxtaJ2x1s2Iin2NqM2Jn6balxITiM3ZO-pY9W-IQoZUyNT-SC2r-8pHB4YBSTPlz7tuqI5926NM5IU) or contact us via social media.
If you have any questions feel free to ask them via discord, facebook messenger or email and we'll get back to you as quick as we can.
Hope to see you there!

item.title: Blood on the Clocktower nykomlingsträff - Svenska
item.description:
Blood on the Clocktower är ett social spel där två lag kommer att försöka vinna. De onda lagets mål är att döda alla andra och hålla demonen vid liv. De goda lagets mål är att hitta och döda demonen. Alla kommer ha krafter i detta spel. Under spelets gång kommer man att ljuga med andra, försöka lista ut ändras karaktärer och ha privata diskussioner.
OBS!! Vi kommer att spela deta spelet på svenska och spela med det lättaste manuset. Vi kommer att gå igenom de karaktärer/roler som vi kommer att spela med.
Gratis för GoBo medlemar, kostar 50kr för icke medlemar

item.title: Simple and Social Gaming
item.description:
On Saturday morning we will be hosting a session for people who are new to board gaming or who prefer games with simple, easy to learn rules.
We will pull out a variety of games such as ticket to ride, clank, kingdomino, roll and write, flamne rouge, mysterium, dixit and las vegas and explain how to play over a light fika.

item.title: Play board games with Gothenburg Boardgamers - Open for everyone
item.description:
## What we're about
GoBo is a board game association for people of all ages and levels of experience. We provide locales to play in and boardgames (over 500 of them), have some snacks and drinks for sale and create different events. The purpose of the association is to bring people together through board gaming and to create a safe enviroment where everyone can feel welcome.
We're located on Gyllenkrooksgatan 5, to the left of the main entrance and we're open every wednesday 18-22 and every saturday 12-22 at the earliest. We also offer a variety of themed days and special events.
Visiting us and playing with us is always completely free the first time and after the first time you have the option of becoming a member or a paying a small fee each time you visit.
If you want to play something you can just drop in when we're open. There's no need to announce that you're coming or bring someone to play with, there are always people around ready to play something within a reasonable time period. You also don't need to have played board games before, we are always happy to explain rules for new players.
\*Please note that we are a large club with hundreds of active members, most of whom do not use meetup. The attendance numbers on this event are therefore much lower than the number of people who will actually be at the club.
For more information on membership, how to get to us etc. you can visit our website on [www.gothenburgboardgamers.se.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.gothenburgboardgamers.se%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1sfn3yFfAB6B5qmqSYQo2f_gJ1Mk9Y21Dj-Smfe746ajTH6wGMvAy3VQE&h=AT3-GlcVLUkzu0Ac7Ssgvg9O5LW6Bj73bd-x6chXm0C9B-ggImutKRD5yxk6d14SYn7SHnS0QOBfpe60TOkQYnXvfvPRfjKIoJ5Rf05L_FtCQGC9cNcKDBexammloywfxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT3Zm80FT7rliNwE1ITfOcyw2CeIOHuFcPCCIGQzpi_2BLjm_9MqLFsPFtMsQgHETxwpXXBL4F3O1hakoDV2c0JzuIQbVlr-gsXfnBIbLsbk-E3pgzYilzq-zllVjXwxtaJ2x1s2Iin2NqM2Jn6balxITiM3ZO-pY9W-IQoZUyNT-SC2r-8pHB4YBSTPlz7tuqI5926NM5IU)
If you have any questions feel free to ask them via social media or email and we'll get back to you as quick as we can.
Hope to see you there!

item.title: Play board games with Gothenburg Boardgamers - Open for everyone
item.description:
## What we're about
GoBo is a board game association for people of all ages and levels of experience. We provide locales to play in and boardgames (over 500 of them), have some snacks and drinks for sale and create different events. The purpose of the association is to bring people together through board gaming and to create a safe enviroment where everyone can feel welcome.
We're located on Gyllenkrooksgatan 5, to the left of the main entrance and we're open every wednesday 18-22 and every saturday 12-22 at the earliest. We also offer a variety of themed days and special events.
Visiting us and playing with us is always completely free the first time and after the first time you have the option of becoming a member or a paying a small fee each time you visit.
If you want to play something you can just drop in when we're open. There's no need to announce that you're coming or bring someone to play with, there are always people around ready to play something within a reasonable time period. You also don't need to have played board games before, we are always happy to explain rules for new players.
We are a club with hundreds of active members, most of whom do not use meetup, therefore attendance numbers on meetup do not reflect the number of people at the club.
For more information on membership, how to get to us etc. you can visit our website on [www.gothenburgboardgamers.se](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.gothenburgboardgamers.se%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1sfn3yFfAB6B5qmqSYQo2f_gJ1Mk9Y21Dj-Smfe746ajTH6wGMvAy3VQE&h=AT3-GlcVLUkzu0Ac7Ssgvg9O5LW6Bj73bd-x6chXm0C9B-ggImutKRD5yxk6d14SYn7SHnS0QOBfpe60TOkQYnXvfvPRfjKIoJ5Rf05L_FtCQGC9cNcKDBexammloywfxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT3Zm80FT7rliNwE1ITfOcyw2CeIOHuFcPCCIGQzpi_2BLjm_9MqLFsPFtMsQgHETxwpXXBL4F3O1hakoDV2c0JzuIQbVlr-gsXfnBIbLsbk-E3pgzYilzq-zllVjXwxtaJ2x1s2Iin2NqM2Jn6balxITiM3ZO-pY9W-IQoZUyNT-SC2r-8pHB4YBSTPlz7tuqI5926NM5IU) or contact us via social media.
If you have any questions feel free to ask them via discord, facebook messenger or email and we'll get back to you as quick as we can.
Hope to see you there!

item.title: Play board games with Gothenburg Boardgamers - Open for everyone
item.description:
## What we're about
GoBo is a board game association for people of all ages and levels of experience. We provide locales to play in and boardgames (over 500 of them), have some snacks and drinks for sale and create different events. The purpose of the association is to bring people together through board gaming and to create a safe enviroment where everyone can feel welcome.
We're located on Gyllenkrooksgatan 5, to the left of the main entrance and we're open every wednesday 18-22 and every saturday 12-22 at the earliest. We also offer a variety of themed days and special events.
Visiting us and playing with us is always completely free the first time and after the first time you have the option of becoming a member or a paying a small fee each time you visit.
If you want to play something you can just drop in when we're open. There's no need to announce that you're coming or bring someone to play with, there are always people around ready to play something within a reasonable time period. You also don't need to have played board games before, we are always happy to explain rules for new players.
\*Please note that we are a large club with hundreds of active members, most of whom do not use meetup. The attendance numbers on this event are therefore much lower than the number of people who will actually be at the club.
For more information on membership, how to get to us etc. you can visit our website on [www.gothenburgboardgamers.se.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.gothenburgboardgamers.se%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1sfn3yFfAB6B5qmqSYQo2f_gJ1Mk9Y21Dj-Smfe746ajTH6wGMvAy3VQE&h=AT3-GlcVLUkzu0Ac7Ssgvg9O5LW6Bj73bd-x6chXm0C9B-ggImutKRD5yxk6d14SYn7SHnS0QOBfpe60TOkQYnXvfvPRfjKIoJ5Rf05L_FtCQGC9cNcKDBexammloywfxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT3Zm80FT7rliNwE1ITfOcyw2CeIOHuFcPCCIGQzpi_2BLjm_9MqLFsPFtMsQgHETxwpXXBL4F3O1hakoDV2c0JzuIQbVlr-gsXfnBIbLsbk-E3pgzYilzq-zllVjXwxtaJ2x1s2Iin2NqM2Jn6balxITiM3ZO-pY9W-IQoZUyNT-SC2r-8pHB4YBSTPlz7tuqI5926NM5IU)
If you have any questions feel free to ask them via social media or email and we'll get back to you as quick as we can.
Hope to see you there!

item.title: Play board games with Gothenburg Boardgamers - Open for everyone
item.description:
## What we're about
GoBo is a board game association for people of all ages and levels of experience. We provide locales to play in and boardgames (over 500 of them), have some snacks and drinks for sale and create different events. The purpose of the association is to bring people together through board gaming and to create a safe enviroment where everyone can feel welcome.
We're located on Gyllenkrooksgatan 5, to the left of the main entrance and we're open every wednesday 18-22 and every saturday 12-22 at the earliest. We also offer a variety of themed days and special events.
Visiting us and playing with us is always completely free the first time and after the first time you have the option of becoming a member or a paying a small fee each time you visit.
If you want to play something you can just drop in when we're open. There's no need to announce that you're coming or bring someone to play with, there are always people around ready to play something within a reasonable time period. You also don't need to have played board games before, we are always happy to explain rules for new players.
We are a club with hundreds of active members, most of whom do not use meetup, therefore attendance numbers on meetup do not reflect the number of people at the club.
For more information on membership, how to get to us etc. you can visit our website on [www.gothenburgboardgamers.se](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.gothenburgboardgamers.se%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1sfn3yFfAB6B5qmqSYQo2f_gJ1Mk9Y21Dj-Smfe746ajTH6wGMvAy3VQE&h=AT3-GlcVLUkzu0Ac7Ssgvg9O5LW6Bj73bd-x6chXm0C9B-ggImutKRD5yxk6d14SYn7SHnS0QOBfpe60TOkQYnXvfvPRfjKIoJ5Rf05L_FtCQGC9cNcKDBexammloywfxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT3Zm80FT7rliNwE1ITfOcyw2CeIOHuFcPCCIGQzpi_2BLjm_9MqLFsPFtMsQgHETxwpXXBL4F3O1hakoDV2c0JzuIQbVlr-gsXfnBIbLsbk-E3pgzYilzq-zllVjXwxtaJ2x1s2Iin2NqM2Jn6balxITiM3ZO-pY9W-IQoZUyNT-SC2r-8pHB4YBSTPlz7tuqI5926NM5IU) or contact us via social media.
If you have any questions feel free to ask them via discord, facebook messenger or email and we'll get back to you as quick as we can.
Hope to see you there!

item.title: Gaming in lättsvenska
item.description:
Join us for a språkcafe style mix of gaming and practising your Swedish. We have native Swedish speaking hosts who will help new speakers learn both game rules and Swedish in a relaxed and quiet environment.
The focus will be on simple games which include plenty of conversation, such as räckare, codenames and dixit, over tea/ coffee.
As usual, our events are free of charge for members and cost 50kr for non-members.

item.title: Play board games with Gothenburg Boardgamers - Open for everyone
item.description:
## What we're about
GoBo is a board game association for people of all ages and levels of experience. We provide locales to play in and boardgames (over 500 of them), have some snacks and drinks for sale and create different events. The purpose of the association is to bring people together through board gaming and to create a safe enviroment where everyone can feel welcome.
We're located on Gyllenkrooksgatan 5, to the left of the main entrance and we're open every wednesday 18-22 and every saturday 12-22 at the earliest. We also offer a variety of themed days and special events.
Visiting us and playing with us is always completely free the first time and after the first time you have the option of becoming a member or a paying a small fee each time you visit.
If you want to play something you can just drop in when we're open. There's no need to announce that you're coming or bring someone to play with, there are always people around ready to play something within a reasonable time period. You also don't need to have played board games before, we are always happy to explain rules for new players.
\*Please note that we are a large club with hundreds of active members, most of whom do not use meetup. The attendance numbers on this event are therefore much lower than the number of people who will actually be at the club.
For more information on membership, how to get to us etc. you can visit our website on [www.gothenburgboardgamers.se.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.gothenburgboardgamers.se%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1sfn3yFfAB6B5qmqSYQo2f_gJ1Mk9Y21Dj-Smfe746ajTH6wGMvAy3VQE&h=AT3-GlcVLUkzu0Ac7Ssgvg9O5LW6Bj73bd-x6chXm0C9B-ggImutKRD5yxk6d14SYn7SHnS0QOBfpe60TOkQYnXvfvPRfjKIoJ5Rf05L_FtCQGC9cNcKDBexammloywfxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT3Zm80FT7rliNwE1ITfOcyw2CeIOHuFcPCCIGQzpi_2BLjm_9MqLFsPFtMsQgHETxwpXXBL4F3O1hakoDV2c0JzuIQbVlr-gsXfnBIbLsbk-E3pgzYilzq-zllVjXwxtaJ2x1s2Iin2NqM2Jn6balxITiM3ZO-pY9W-IQoZUyNT-SC2r-8pHB4YBSTPlz7tuqI5926NM5IU)

Hope to see you there!

item.title: Play board games with Gothenburg Boardgamers - Open for everyone
item.description:
## What we're about
GoBo is a board game association for people of all ages and levels of experience. We provide locales to play in and boardgames (over 500 of them), have some snacks and drinks for sale and create different events. The purpose of the association is to bring people together through board gaming and to create a safe enviroment where everyone can feel welcome.
We're located on Gyllenkrooksgatan 5, to the left of the main entrance and we're open every wednesday 18-22 and every saturday 12-22 at the earliest. We also offer a variety of themed days and special events.
Visiting us and playing with us is always completely free the first time and after the first time you have the option of becoming a member or a paying a small fee each time you visit.
If you want to play something you can just drop in when we're open. There's no need to announce that you're coming or bring someone to play with, there are always people around ready to play something within a reasonable time period. You also don't need to have played board games before, we are always happy to explain rules for new players.
We are a club with hundreds of active members, most of whom do not use meetup, therefore attendance numbers on meetup do not reflect the number of people at the club.
For more information on membership, how to get to us etc. you can visit our website on [www.gothenburgboardgamers.se](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.gothenburgboardgamers.se%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1sfn3yFfAB6B5qmqSYQo2f_gJ1Mk9Y21Dj-Smfe746ajTH6wGMvAy3VQE&h=AT3-GlcVLUkzu0Ac7Ssgvg9O5LW6Bj73bd-x6chXm0C9B-ggImutKRD5yxk6d14SYn7SHnS0QOBfpe60TOkQYnXvfvPRfjKIoJ5Rf05L_FtCQGC9cNcKDBexammloywfxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT3Zm80FT7rliNwE1ITfOcyw2CeIOHuFcPCCIGQzpi_2BLjm_9MqLFsPFtMsQgHETxwpXXBL4F3O1hakoDV2c0JzuIQbVlr-gsXfnBIbLsbk-E3pgzYilzq-zllVjXwxtaJ2x1s2Iin2NqM2Jn6balxITiM3ZO-pY9W-IQoZUyNT-SC2r-8pHB4YBSTPlz7tuqI5926NM5IU) or contact us via social media.
